model.label: MiMo-V2-Pro
model.description: MiMo • The flagship foundation for the agentic era, built for complex, long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks.

pick.rationale: Houston is the vastly superior team as a 2-seed with elite metrics (KenPom rank 5, Torvik rank 5) and a 28-6 record, while Idaho is a 15-seed from the Big Sky with a KenPom rank of 145 and significantly weaker analytical profile. The Cougars' top-5 defense and efficient offense create a massive talent disparity that Idaho cannot overcome, as reflected by the 23.5-point spread and ESPN Analytics' 98.2% win probability. Historical 2 vs 15 matchups overwhelmingly favor the higher seed, and Houston's overall superiority makes an upset extremely unlikely.

reasoningStep.title: Houston vs Idaho Matchup Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Houston is a dominant 2-seed facing a significant underdog in 15-seed Idaho, with massive disparities in team quality and metrics.
reasoningStep.evidence: Houston ranks #5 in both KenPom and Torvik with elite defensive efficiency (rank 4) and strong offense (rank 13-16). Idaho ranks #145 in KenPom and #136 in Torvik with weaker offensive (rank 166) and defensive (rank 122) efficiency. ESPN Analytics gives Houston a 98.2% win probability with a 23.5-point spread. No significant injury concerns were found for Houston that would substantially narrow the gap. Historical 2 vs 15 matchups have a win rate exceeding 95% for the higher seed.

Houston had just run out of steam. result.title: Houston Cougars Basketball: Analyzing the Best and Worst March Madness ...
result.snippet: On April 5, 2025, Houston secured what many historians consider the most significant single-game victory in the program's modern era. Facing Duke in a Final Four rematch of the previous year's Sweet 16—a game defined by a debilitating ankle injury to captain Jamal Shead—the Cougars sought both a title berth and retribution.

You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.

Houston had just run out of steam. result.title: Houston Cougars Basketball: Analyzing the Best and Worst March Madness ...
result.snippet: On April 5, 2025, Houston secured what many historians consider the most significant single-game victory in the program's modern era. Facing Duke in a Final Four rematch of the previous year's Sweet 16—a game defined by a debilitating ankle injury to captain Jamal Shead—the Cougars sought both a title berth and retribution.
